creator: fbsd@www.zefox.net
text:
This is a recurring crash when trying to compile firefox on RPI2.
The .cpp and .sh files mentioned by the crash message are at
www.zefox.net/~fbsd/rpi2/crashes/crash_10_11_16 

The .cpp file is too large to be attached to the bug report.

Thanks for reading,

bob prohaska
